trait.confidence_notes: GWAS is sex-combined; dosage-compensation assumptions are not explicit. eQTL follow-up completed for rsID-addressable loci; some loci lacked a usable rsID.
trait.eqtl_lookup_note: eQTL follow-up completed for rsID-addressable loci; some loci lacked a usable rsID.
trait.category: Biological samples > Assay results > Blood assays > Blood count
trait.description_more: Result of "Immature Reticulocytes Fraction" assay, performed on blood sample, obtained from UK Biobank assessment centre visit. Immature Reticulocytes Fraction (Percentage) is an indication of new reticulocyte synthesis and is calculated from the reticulocytes (Percentage) as the total number of reticulocyte events in the outermost light scattering region, corresponding to immature reticulocytes, relative to the total number of reticulocytes and is reported as this ratio.
